sql_array: CREATE TABLE dates_test (event_id UInt32, event_date Date);
INSERT INTO dates_test (event_id, event_date) VALUES (1, makeDate(2023, 5, 15));
INSERT INTO dates_test (event_id, event_date) VALUES (2, makeDate(2023, 135));
UPDATE dates_test SET event_date = makeDate(2022, 12, 31) WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_date, makeDate(2023, event_id) AS generated_date FROM dates_test;
